items.title: welcome
items.body:
this is a small place for things i find beautiful, interesting, or worth keeping.

there's no real theme. no careful curation. just a collection of moments that made me stop and look a little longer.

items.title: monsoon light
items.caption: the kind of grey that makes everything else look saturated. pink neon bleeding into wet asphalt. nobody is in a hurry but nobody is still either.

items.title: zardozi
items.caption: gulaabi phool on dark silk. someone's hands made this. probably at night.

items.title: a note on seeing
items.body:
photography for me is less about capturing and more about remembering why something stopped me in my tracks.

the image is just a receipt.

items.title: nightfall
items.caption: when the sky forgets to be blue. somewhere between maghrib and isha, the city exhales.
